characters.name: Politician A
characters.personality: Overly dramatic, uses big words incorrectly, always blames the opposition.

characters.name: Politician B
characters.personality: Speaks in folksy metaphors, pretends to be a commoner, passive-aggressive.

history.text: My opponent’s scandalous insistence on excluding pineapple is a flagrant, sycophantic catastrophe that reeks of their party’s pathetic inability to embrace culinary progress! To deny this golden, succulent fruit its rightful throne is a gargantuan travesty that only a diabolical opposition would orchestrate to stifle our nation’s palate.

Well now, bless your heart, but just because you can put a saddle on a cow don't mean it’s a horse, and just because you can toss a fruit salad on a crust don't mean it’s a pizza. Folks 'round here prefer their supper without a side of indigestion, so maybe you oughta stop trying to dress up a soggy catastrophe as "progress."
